concerns.text: FR-001 and US-1 require a unified synthetic data generation with participant-level linkage. Tasks T015 (data acquisition) and T016 (image generation) are split into separate tasks without an explicit integration step ensuring the generated images are linked to the generated participant IDs in a single atomic flow, risking the creation of unlinked datasets.

SC-004 explicitly requires a 'power analysis method specified' in the output. No task in the plan (including T018 which only checks N≥100) covers the implementation of a power analysis calculation or the generation of a report documenting the method.

FR-010 requires a summary table listing 'binning_strategy', 'Pearson r-value', and 'p-value'. Task T043 generates a CSV but omits the 'binning_strategy' column in its description, failing to cover the full requirement for verifying robustness.

Edge Cases in spec.md mandate assigning NaN to object count on detection failure and excluding from analysis. Task T026 instructs assigning a 'count proxy' value instead, which contradicts the spec's requirement to exclude the data point, leaving the spec requirement unmet.

SC-005 requires explicit justification of the p<0.05 threshold as a 'community-standard convention'. Task T037 covers associational framing and citations but lacks a specific step to generate the text justification for the alpha threshold.
